---
title: "General Tipps"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{general_tipps}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

### Naming Convention for Repositories

- MUST: repository names need to be unique
- Recommendation: we suggest using the dataset key as a name, i.e. `ch.kof.globalbaro` is both the key, and the repo name.
